title: Add --version and --help flags to archmcp CLI
description: Add --version (with build-time version injection via ldflags) and --help flags to the archmcp CLI binary.

title: Track 1: Tree-sitter AST migration (Python, Ruby)
description: Migrate regex-based extractors to tree-sitter AST parsing. Python and Ruby remaining. Go stays on go/ast. TypeScript already on tree-sitter. Kotlin/Swift blocked (no Go grammar bindings).

title: Rewrite Python extractor on tree-sitter AST
Track 2: Deeper analysis explainers (dead code, trait coverage, test mapping)
description: New explainers that work on the fact graph to provide deeper architectural insights. Works with any extractor (regex or tree-sitter). Dead code detection, trait/interface implementation coverage, test-to-module mapping.

title: Shared tree-sitter walker utilities (base helpers)
Rewrite Ruby extractor on tree-sitter AST
Dead code / unreachable symbols explainer
Trait/interface implementation coverage explainer
Test-to-module mapping explainer
description: Implemented test-to-module mapping explainer (testmap) with full TDD. testmap.go (257 lines): TestMapExplainer implements Explainer interface, isTestFile() detects Go/Python/TS/JS test conventions, mapTestsToModules() by directory prefix, countSymbolsByModule() for density. 3 insight types: coverage summary, untested modules, well-tested modules. testmap_test.go: 10 tests all passing (unit + edge + integration).

title: Tier 1+2 architecture explainers
description: New explainers for deeper architectural insights. Tier 1 (graph-only, no new extraction): coupling analysis, stability metrics, god module detection, dependency depth, blast radius. Tier 2 (needs extractor enrichment): API surface analysis, cohesion analysis, error handling patterns, concurrency patterns. All explainers are language-agnostic (work on fact graph) but Tier 2 needs extractors to emit new fact properties.

title: Error handling patterns explainer + Ruby extractor enrichment
Concurrency patterns explainer + Ruby extractor enrichment
God module detection explainer (symbol count + fan-in/fan-out)
Wire all new explainers into main.go + config defaults
Coupling analysis explainer (cross-module edge density)
Stability metrics explainer (afferent/efferent coupling, instability)
Dependency depth explainer (longest import chain)
API surface analysis explainer (over-exposed symbols)
Cohesion analysis explainer (intra-module call connectivity)
Expose explainers as interactive MCP tools
description: Add MCP tools that call explainers on-demand so LLM agents can query architectural insights interactively. Currently explainers only run during snapshot generation. Need: analyze_coupling, check_stability, find_dead_code, detect_god_modules, analyze_cohesion, check_dep_depth, analyze_api_surface, check_coverage, map_tests. Also register all new explainers in main.go. Also wire into config defaults.

title: Register all new explainers in main.go + config defaults
Add MCP tools for Tier 1 explainers (coupling, stability, godmodule, depdepth)
Add MCP tools for Tier 2 explainers (apisurface, cohesion) + earlier explainers (deadcode, coverage, testmap)
